/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH4 CJ 130 D/CTS 15/VF2 150/COA 40/ICNA/COLLECT/4019HALF/CTORD:UNDER DUENAS, ALL FINES & FEES ARE SUSPENDED/30    CAPD MISD RESTREPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/CTORD:THEDEFENCE ATTORNEYS SHALL SET A FUTURE DATE FOR A RESTITUTION REPORT FROM APD'S VRU/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM THIS SENTENCE MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONSOF THE PROBATION IN COURT NO,17010468, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO A CPOFOR VICTIM RAYMOND W & RAINBOW GROCERY,/X:(SEE #17010468 FOR CPO)/CAPD PPRF REPORT/PPRFCUST/PPRFRPT:12-17-19/CONTD:PPRF COMPLIANCE, ORDER VICTIM RESTITUTION REPORT FROM VRU & CONFIRM TX DATE/DOP/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING & PD MTS/X THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINTTO INCLUDE COUNT 4, PC242, A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF N/DEFT ADV RTS:4/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-08-19/987,2/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS DENIED/BAIL:75,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
